scripts.tauri:dev: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=kinesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=kinesis tauri dev --features kinesis
scripts.tauri:dev:kinesis: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=kinesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=kinesis tauri dev --features kinesis
scripts.tauri:dev:genesis: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=genesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=genesis tauri dev --features genesis
scripts.tauri:build: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=kinesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=kinesis tauri build --features kinesis
scripts.tauri:build:kinesis: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=kinesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=kinesis tauri build --features kinesis
scripts.tauri:build:genesis: cross-env TAURI_BRANDING=genesis node scripts/set-tauri.cjs && cross-env VITE_BRANDING=genesis tauri build --features genesis
